final:
module RefModule(

	input clk,
	input [31:0] instrIn,
	input [31:0] pcplus4,
	output reg [31:0] instrOut,
	output reg [31:0] pcplus_4
    );  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt)
begin
 instrOut <= instrIn;
 pcplus_4 <= pcplus4;
end

endmodule
